mapper.sql: id, community_id, house_no, application_id, car_plate_id, car_number, status, start_time, expire_time, activation_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, deleted_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visitor_authorization (community_id, house_no, application_id, car_plate_id, car_number, status, start_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{communityId}, #{houseNo}, #{applicationId}, #{carPlateId}, #{carNumber}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{expireTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM visitor_authorization WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM visitor_authorization WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND car_number = #{carNumber} AND status = 'approved_pending_activation' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE visitor_authorization SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM visitor_authorization WHERE status = 'approved_pending_activation' AND expire_time < NOW() AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE visitor_authorization SET status = 'unavailable', update_time = NOW() WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND status = 'approved_pending_activation' AND is_deleted = 0
